Home/Solutions/Rapid Prototyping

Rapid Prototype Manufacturing and Iteration

Use CNC, 3D printing, sheet metal and finishing combinations to support functional, appearance and assembly validation, shortening the path from idea to physical part.

Functional PrototypeAppearance PrototypeAssembly ValidationSmall-Batch Iteration
Upload Now

Choose the Right Prototyping Path

The prototype page focuses on R&D validation. Lead time and cost are affected by material, complexity, quantity, post-processing and inspection requirements.

CNC Functional Prototypes

Suitable for real materials, assembly validation and parts with higher precision requirements.

3D Printing Validation

Suitable for complex structures, internal channels and fast early concept validation.

Sheet Metal and Appearance Parts

Suitable for brackets, enclosures, housings and low-volume structural validation.

Information Preparation

01
Model FilesProvide STEP, IGES, STL or 3MF files and note units and versions.
02
Drawings and TolerancesCritical dimensions, tolerances, threads, surfaces and inspection requirements should be noted on drawings.
03
Quantity and UseExplain validation goals, quantity, assembly target and whether multiple iterations are needed.

Prototype Validation Is More Than Appearance

The page breaks prototype goals into material, structure, assembly, appearance and testing requirements to help decide whether CNC, 3D printing, sheet metal or a combined process is appropriate.

Functional ValidationConfirm usability firstFocus on material strength, assembly relationships, movement clearance and critical dimensions, suitable for first-round physical validation.
Appearance ValidationConfirm product-like appearance firstFocus on shape, color, texture, finish and display effect, suitable for reporting, demos and customer confirmation.
Small-Batch Trial ProductionConfirm stable delivery firstFocus on process rhythm, inspection plan, packaging and repeat-order consistency to prepare for production introduction.

Turn prototype needs into assessable manufacturing tasks

Start with model upload and quickly receive process suggestions and quotation direction.
